---
title: "\'Real Childhood, A\' By Miss Yonge"
---

## \'Real Childhood, A\' By Miss Yonge

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1892
**Genre:** Non-Fiction, reminiscences.
**Format:** Article in Journal

**Publisher:** <i>Mothers in Council</i> 2:5 (April 1892) 87-94

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
